items.name: Teeth Cleaning
items.tagline: Professional cleaning and oral health check.
items.description: A thorough cleaning removes plaque and tartar buildup, polishes enamel, and includes a full oral health assessment. Recommended every six months for most patients.

items.name: Teeth Whitening
items.tagline: Professional whitening for a brighter smile.
items.description: In-office whitening delivers dramatic results in a single visit using professional-grade gel and light activation. Take-home options also available for gradual whitening.

items.name: Porcelain Veneers
items.tagline: Thin porcelain shells for a transformed smile.
items.description: Custom-crafted veneers cover the front surface of teeth to correct discoloration, chips, gaps, or shape. Results are natural-looking and long-lasting.

items.name: Invisalign
items.description: Invisalign uses a series of clear, removable aligners to gradually straighten teeth without metal braces. Most patients complete treatment in 12 to 18 months.

items.name: Dental Implants
items.tagline: Permanent tooth replacement that looks and feels natural.
items.description: Implants are titanium posts surgically placed in the jawbone to support a crown, bridge, or denture. They look, feel, and function like natural teeth.

items.name: Emergency Dental Care
items.description: We reserve time each day for patients experiencing pain, broken teeth, lost fillings, or other urgent dental needs. Call us and we will do our best to see you same day.
